title: DOS proposes revisions to Form DS-2019, Certificate of Eligibility for J-1 Status
description_html: DOS announces that the following information collection has been submitted to OMB for review and approval and that a 30-day notice and comment period has been provided on proposed revisions to Form DS-2019, Certificate of Eligibility for Exchange Visitor (J-1) Status. Comments are due Nov. 25, 2020. Minor changes have been made to the wording in the 212(e) section entitled Signature of Responsible Officer or Alternate Responsible Officer. This form is used by potential Exchange Visitor Program participants to request J-visas at U.S. Embassies and Consulates abroad [ID #1126]
